home.doctorViewDesc: Access assessment forms, child timelines and progress heatmaps.
home.parentViewDesc: Simple summaries, next-step guidance and home-practice tips.
home.adminViewDesc: Manage doctors, parent accounts and assessment templates.

spider.heading: ADHD screening hub for
spider.tagline: One portal for doctors, parents and admins. Start from the role that matches you and explore tailored dashboards, progress tracking and child-friendly assessments.
spider.separateAccess: Separate access for doctors, parents and school staff
spider.guestMode: Guest mode for demo and training
spider.chooseLeg: Choose a leg to continue with your role.
spider.doctorAppDesc: Submit your details & registration ID. Admin will verify and create your Doctor ID.
spider.parentAccessDesc: Parent account is created by your child's doctor. Use your Parent ID & password.
spider.guestDesc: Explore the portal in demo mode. No child data is stored.
spider.adminDesc: Restricted to system administrators. Use your official credentials.

doctor.todaysChildrenDesc: Parent-based view of children scheduled for ADHD screening.
doctor.searchPlaceholder: Search by Parent ID or Parent name...
doctor.trialDesc: Showing two trials per game for this week. Values are demo scores (0–100).
doctor.reviewDesc: Use this space to record feedback you plan to share with the parent (not visible to them yet).
doctor.reviewPlaceholder: Eg: Child shows improvement in sustained attention during eye-tracking game...
doctor.oneParent: One parent account per child. Use this for new families.
doctor.newAccountNote: New account will appear in the table with a generated Parent ID.
doctor.noReviews: No reviews saved yet. Select a parent and add review notes from the detail panel.

parent.childOverviewDesc: A calm snapshot of progress, upcoming appointments and doctor notes.
parent.wireBackend: You can wire this to your messaging backend later.

guest.disclaimerText: This game gives an initial analysis of ADHD likelihood based on your child's responses. The result may not always be accurate, so please use it only as a guide. If the result suggests a possibility of ADHD or if you have any concerns consult a qualified doctor for proper evaluation.
guest.chooseGame: Choose a game below. Each guest account can play every game once as a single trial.
guest.eyeTrackingDesc: Follow moving targets to measure focus, saccades and gaze shifts.
guest.bodyPostureDesc: Mirror simple poses to observe restlessness, fidgeting and posture changes.
guest.voiceTrackingDesc: Read fun phrases aloud while the system listens for pace and impulsive speech.
guest.handwritingDesc: Trace shapes and letters to capture handwriting rhythm and micro-pauses.
guest.trialSummaryDescC: trial per game. Once you have completed all four games, you can send a combined demo report to your email.
guest.completeAll: Complete all 4 games to unlock email summary.
guest.resultsSent: Results sent to your email (demo only).

admin.pendingDoctorsDesc: Review applications and verify medical council IDs before activating access.
admin.dataPortalsDesc: Redirect testers to the correct capture environment.

saimanInstructions.title: 🦸 Saiman Says
saimanInstructions.howToPlayDesc: Follow Saiman's moves like a superhero. Sometimes you must move, sometimes you must stay still!
saimanInstructions.doActionText: When you see the action clip, copy it clearly.
saimanInstructions.freezeText: When it's FREEZE time, stay very still.
saimanInstructions.powerChargeText: Your power bar fills when you follow correctly.
saimanInstructions.tryBestText: No worries if you make mistakes. Keep going!
saimanInstructions.tip1: Stand where your full body fits in the camera.
saimanInstructions.tip2: Keep the room bright (turn on lights).
saimanInstructions.tip3: Face the screen and try to stay in the middle.
saimanInstructions.saimanDesc: Watch the action video and copy the movement. When it's FREEZE, stay still like a superhero statue.

speech.heroDesc: Read amazing stories and record your voice! Our friendly AI helps analyze speech patterns to support learning.
speech.powerfulFeaturesDesc: Our AI-powered platform provides comprehensive speech analysis with cutting-edge technology
speech.fileUploadDesc: Support for multiple audio formats including WAV, MP3, M4A, FLAC, and OGG files up to 50MB.
speech.aiAnalysisDesc: Advanced machine learning algorithms analyze acoustic features like MFCCs, pitch, and jitter patterns.
speech.speechTranscriptionDesc: Automatic transcription of speech content with support for Sinhala language recognition.
speech.detailedReportsDesc: Comprehensive analysis reports with probability scores, feature breakdowns, and clinical recommendations.
speech.securePrivateDesc: All audio processing happens locally with enterprise-grade security and privacy protection.
speech.fastResultsDesc: Get analysis results in under 2 minutes with our optimized processing pipeline.
speech.footerDesc: Advanced machine learning technology for early ADHD detection through speech pattern analysis. Empowering healthcare professionals with data-driven insights.
speech.copyright: © 2024 ADHD Speech Analyzer. All rights reserved.
speech.chooseAgeDesc: Pick your age to start the reading adventure! 📚
speech.analyzeSpeechDesc: Upload an audio file and let our AI analyze speech patterns for ADHD indicators
speech.analyzingWait: This may take a few moments...
speech.analysisCompleteDesc: Here are the detailed results of your speech analysis
speech.dropAudioDesc: or click to browse. We support WAV, MP3, M4A, FLAC, and OGG files up to 50MB.
speech.recordingTip: Speak clearly for at least 30 seconds. Click stop when finished.
speech.recordPermTip: Record your voice directly in the browser. Make sure to grant microphone permissions.
speech.ageNote: Age affects analysis parameters and reading expectations

hw.title: Handwriting Fun
hw.desc: Calm, short handwriting activities. Let your child try and you can tap
hw.guide1: Pick grade → child traces the word/letter.
hw.guide2: Use "Show guide" to help them trace.
hw.guide3: Use "Mini break" if the child gets restless.
hw.gradeDifficultyNote: Activities are Sinhala-friendly and increase in difficulty.
hw.gradeTip: Tip: For best ADHD focus, start with
hw.disclaimer: This is a supportive activity, not a diagnosis tool.
hw.effortTip: Tip: Praise effort. Short strokes are okay. 😊
hw.troubleBackend: Ensure the backend server is running on http://localhost:8000
hw.troubleJson: Check if the JSON file has valid stroke data
hw.troubleFormat: Verify the file format matches the expected structure
hw.troubleConsole: Check browser console for more details
hw.disclaimerNote: Note: This is a prediction based on handwriting analysis and should not be used as a medical diagnosis.
